body_transformation: The bulbous body now appears as a translucent violet sphere with faint internal energy currents flowing beneath its surface, while the skull and crossbones symbol on the chest is rendered in deep ebony black with a subtle crimson mist glow. The clouds surrounding the head transform into wispy, semi-transparent vapor trails that drift upward, and the curled tail tip dissolves into a tattered, shadowy vapor stream that leaves faint energy ripples in its wake. Short stubby legs remain but now appear as faint, ghostly outlines with a pale silver sheen, and the overall silhouette maintains its low, quadrupedal stance without any structural changes to its rounded form.
signature_feature: Skull and crossbones: deep ebony black with crimson mist glow and swirling energy currents.
